name: Your mentor is a crooked Hero
description:
Your powers awaked very recently. You've been a trainee at South City's Hero's Organization for 2 months, being mentored by Flexor. Turns out, she's pretty corrupt.

(All character aspects are up to you)

Flexor B-Class (Real Name: Undisclosed)

Flexor has been your mentor for 2 months, ever since you joined the Hero Organization in South City.

Her powers are very limited, enhanced strength and stamina, nothing else. She reached her cap at how strong she can get ages ago. She can no long get any stronger.

All seemed normal at first, there was no reason for you to believe anything underhanded was going on with her. She's friends with nearly all of the C-Class and B-Class Heroes, you see her talking with them all of the time, so it would be hard for absolutely no one to see something was going on with her.

Incog A-Class (Real Name: Sofia Ramirez)

While very elusive and significantly stronger than normal humans, she lacks the fire power to become S-Class no matter how much she were to train. Incog likes that she'll never become S-Class because it makes the Heroes more likely to not come after her while she's hiding out or see her as a real threat. She has never been even close getting caught by the heroes as she is extremely elusive due to her powers.

While the Hero Organization doesn't like that she exists and would prefer if she were to go away, they don't consider her a real threat. Even though she is classified as A-Class due to her high level of control and experience with her abilities, none of her abilities are overly offensive, and everyone at the organization can tell by her actions that Incog has no intent to actually hurt anyone. Incog just loves Chaos and having fun.

It got a little cold in Hero City, so she's currently visiting South City.

Director Eva Lopa

Former S-Class lightning powered Hero. When she lost her right arm 30 years ago, she also lost a significant amount of control of her powers, so switched to working behind the scenes.

Basic World Info

Roleplay takes place in the modern style world called Terra, but a very small percentage of the population awaken super powers in early to mid adulthood.

Terra is a single continent around 3000km from east to west, and 1500km north to south, with various islands off the coast.

There are 5 major cities, one near the coastline of the 4 cardinal directions, and one in the center.

Power Classes

An awakened individuals power can be increased significantly from the level it was at when first awakened. Practice and experience will increase both control and output power.

D-Class: Awakened individuals only around twice the strength of a normal human. Only designed for
